summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: System Updates page (super_admin only), Calculator in POS page. All features working correctly. Backend APIs properly secured with super_admin role check.

issues: Page still renders for non-super-admin users (shows empty data). Consider adding frontend route protection to redirect unauthorized users.

passed_tests.feature: NT Commerce section visible in sidebar for super_admin
passed_tests.details: NT Commerce section with 'لوحة تحكم SaaS' and 'تحديثات النظام' links visible

passed_tests.feature: NT Commerce section hidden for regular admin
passed_tests.details: admin@test.com cannot see NT Commerce section in sidebar

passed_tests.feature: System Updates page loads for super_admin
passed_tests.details: Page shows stats cards, announcements tab, settings push tab
Creates announcement and sends notifications to users
Pushes settings to tenants (0 tenants in test environment)
Returns 403 'Super admin access required' for non-super_admin users
Button with data-testid='calculator-btn' found and clickable
Close button closes the calculator modal
When announcement is created, notifications are generated for users

action_items: OPTIONAL: Add frontend route protection for /system-updates to redirect non-super_admin users to dashboard instead of showing empty page
critical_code_review_comments: All new features properly implemented with correct data-testid attributes
Backend API authorization working correctly (get_super_admin dependency)
Calculator component properly separated and reusable
Good use of RTL layout for Arabic interface
seed_data_creation: Test announcement created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: System Updates page and Calculator features fully tested and working. super@ntcommerce.com is the super_admin account. NT Commerce section only visible for super_admin role. Calculator is accessible via button in POS page top bar (calculator icon).
